items.title: Deere Calls 2026 the Bottom as Caterpillar Rides Energy Growth Past Estimates
items.description: Caterpillar (NYSE: CAT) and Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) both reported results showing the same headwinds hitting in very different ways. Caterpillar beat estimates with modest earnings pressure. Deere missed badly, with full-year net income down 29% as the agricultural downcycle crushed core segments. One Diversifies Through the Storm. One Takes It on the Chin. ... Deere Calls 2026 the Bottom as Caterpillar Rides Energy Growth Past Estimates
